title: taraxacum ecmiadzinum
intro: Taraxacum ecmiadzinum, commonly known as Armenian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum ecmiadzinum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a raw vegetable or used in cooking.
